title: Add study material upload functionality and configure phone number

requirements.text: Create a backend data type for study materials that includes fields for material ID, title, description, file name, file content (as Blob), course ID association, class level, upload timestamp, and uploader principal

quotes: Add place where i can upload study material

acceptanceCriteria: StudyMaterial type is defined in backend/main.mo
Type includes all necessary fields for managing uploaded materials
Materials can be associated with specific courses and class levels

requirements.text: Implement backend functions for admins to upload study materials (create), retrieve all study materials with filtering by course and class level (read), update material metadata (update), and delete materials (delete)

quotes: Add place where i can upload study material

acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only functions are implemented with proper authorization checks
Upload function accepts file content as Blob with metadata
Retrieve functions support filtering by course ID and class level
Update function allows modifying title, description, and course association
Delete function removes materials by ID

requirements.text: Add backend function for students to download study materials by material ID, returning the file content and metadata

quotes: Add place where i can upload study material

acceptanceCriteria: Function is accessible to authenticated students
Returns file content as Blob along with filename and content type
Students can only access materials for their enrolled courses or class level

requirements.text: Create an admin study materials management page at /admin/materials that displays all uploaded materials in a table with columns for title, description, course, class level, upload date, and actions (edit, delete)

quotes: Add place where i can upload study material

acceptanceCriteria: Page is accessible only to admin users
Table displays all study materials with filtering options by course and class level
Edit and delete actions are functional with confirmation dialogs
Page follows the existing admin page design patterns

requirements.text: Add an upload study material dialog on the admin materials page with a form that includes fields for title, description, course selection, class level selection, and file upload input accepting PDF, DOC, DOCX, PPT, PPTX file types

quotes: Add place where i can upload study material

acceptanceCriteria: Dialog opens from a prominent 'Upload Material' button
Form validates all required fields before submission
File input restricts to educational document types
File size limit is enforced (e.g., 10MB maximum)
Success/error toasts display after upload attempt

requirements.text: Create React Query hooks for study material operations including useStudyMaterials for fetching all materials with filters, useUploadStudyMaterial for admin uploads, useUpdateStudyMaterial for editing, useDeleteStudyMaterial for deletion, and useDownloadStudyMaterial for student downloads

quotes: Add place where i can upload study material

acceptanceCriteria: Hooks are added to frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts following existing patterns
Upload hook handles file conversion to Blob format
Download hook triggers browser download with correct filename
All hooks include proper error handling and cache invalidation

requirements.text: Add a student-facing study materials page at /materials that displays available study materials filtered by the student's enrolled courses and class level, with download buttons for each material

quotes: Add place where i can upload study material

acceptanceCriteria: Page is accessible to authenticated students
Materials are automatically filtered based on student's profile
Each material card shows title, description, course name, and download button
Download triggers file download with appropriate filename
Page follows the existing student page design patterns

requirements.text: Update the Layout component navigation to include a 'Study Materials' link in the student menu pointing to /materials and an 'Upload Materials' link in the admin menu pointing to /admin/materials

quotes: Add place where i can upload study material

acceptanceCriteria: Student navigation includes 'Study Materials' link
Admin navigation includes 'Upload Materials' link
Links are positioned logically within existing menu structure
Mobile menu includes the new navigation items

requirements.text: Add the phone number 7780951766 as a contact phone number displayed in the footer of the Layout component alongside existing branding and social links
acceptanceCriteria: Phone number 7780951766 is visible in the footer
Number is formatted for readability (e.g., +91 778 095 1766 or 778-095-1766)
Phone number includes a phone icon or label like 'Contact:'
Footer layout remains balanced and visually consistent

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
File uploads must be converted to Blob format for backend storage
Only generate migration.mo if existing student/course/attendance/test data structures are modified
nonGoals: Real-time collaborative editing of study materials
Version control or history tracking for uploaded files
External cloud storage integration (e.g., AWS S3, Google Drive)
Advanced file preview functionality within the browser
Automated file scanning or virus detection
Email notifications for new material uploads
